title: Little Lion Man
why_this_song: Little Lion Man by Mumford & Sons (2009) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You know that you have seen this all before
But it was not your fault but mine
And it was your heart on the line
I really fucked it up this time

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "didn't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "didn't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dear" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dear" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And it was your heart on the line

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You'll never be what is in your heart
Spend your days biting your own neck

exercises.prompt_en: "Little Lion Man" was released in 2009. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Little Lion Man" foi lançada em 2009. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Little Lion Man" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Little Lion Man" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Mumford & Sons one question about "Little Lion Man", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Mumford & Sons sobre "Little Lion Man", o que seria e por quê?
